steps.title: Write each person's total charge
steps.content: Antwan charges $10 + 8.5x$ (his $10 equipment fee plus $8.50 per hour), and Taylor charges $7 + 9.5x$ (her $7 equipment fee plus $9.50 per hour).

steps.title: Solve for when Taylor's charge is greater
steps.content:
Set up the inequality for when Taylor's total exceeds Antwan's:
$$7 + 9.5x > 10 + 8.5x$$
Combining like terms:
$$9.5x - 8.5x > 10 - 7$$
$$x > 3$$

That matches choice D — D is correct.
